key_themes: Accelerating satellite launches with imminent New Glenn mission
Q4 2025 revenue beat, strong 2026 guidance, and $3.9B liquidity
Recurring dilution from convertibles/equity offerings and execution risks
Mixed-to-cautious analyst consensus (mostly Hold/Neutral, PTs below current price)
Volatility with pullback from $120+ highs amid broader tech selloff
sources_checked: Analyst reports (Barclays, UBS, B. Riley, Scotiabank)
Recent X posts (latest and semantic search)
summary: AST SpaceMobile delivered a Q4/FY2025 revenue beat ($70.9M, top of guidance), holds ~$3.9B in liquidity after major raises, and is accelerating toward 45-60 satellite launches in 2026 with commercial service targeted by year-end, supported by government contracts and carrier partnerships; an imminent Blue Origin New Glenn launch is generating excitement as a near-term catalyst. However, repeated convertible note and equity offerings have caused notable dilution (stock dropped sharply on February announcements), production scaling has lagged past guidance, and most analysts hold Neutral/Hold or Underweight ratings with price targets (~$65-72 average) below the current ~$85-90 level. The biggest risk is execution slippage on the aggressive launch cadence, which could delay meaningful revenue and exacerbate dilution pressure in a volatile pre-profit story.[[1]](https://finance.yahoo.com/markets/stocks/articles/ast-spacemobile-asts-6-9-130732041.html)[[2]](https://www.fool.com/investing/2026/04/02/prediction-ast-spacemobile-stock-will-soar-in-2026/)[[3]](https://investor.wedbush.com/wedbush/article/finterra-2026-3-30-ast-spacemobile-asts-navigating-the-2026-tech-sell-off-and-the-race-for-space-based-broadband)[[4]](https://seekingalpha.com/news/4559915-ast-spacemobile-outlines-150m-200m-2026-revenue-target-while-accelerating-global-satellite)

recent_posts.highlight: Full scale rocket. Less than 24 hours to go! (referring to upcoming New Glenn launch with ASTS satellites)
Blue Origin New Glenn mission tomorrow carrying ASTS comms satellites; first stage reflight attempt
Sentiment on $ASTS across X is overwhelmingly negative right now... the kind of pessimism you typically see near market bottoms
Prediction: AST SpaceMobile stock will soar in 2026 on revenue ramp (expected >$180M in 2026, much higher later)
Reduced position due to satellite production scaling challenges, past guidance misses, and risk of slower constellation build than expected
